text: I wake up at six every morning and start with a glass of water and a short stretching routine. After a quick shower, I have breakfast and review my schedule for the day. I work from nine to five, usually with a short lunch break. I try to exercise in the evening, either going for a run or doing yoga for about thirty minutes. After that, I cook dinner and spend time reading or watching something light before bed. I keep the same routine every weekday, which helps me stay productive and relaxed. Consistency really makes my daily life feel balanced and manageable.
